titles.notes: First national championship for the Texas Longhorns baseball program.
Back-to-back championships under coach Bibb Falk.
First College World Series title under Cliff Gustafson, the modern era standard-setter.
Second CWS title under Gustafson; cemented Texas as a perennial national power.
Augie Garrido's first national title at Texas. Program returned to dominance.
Sixth and most recent national championship. The 'National Championship Standard' benchmark.

omahaTradition: The Longhorns are the only program with 6+ national titles and consistent CWS presence across eight decades.
